en.headline: Select Small Blind.
en.reason: Small Blind is the current selectable blind in the linear blind path, so taking it preserves round tempo without using a skip.
en.outcome: Entered Small Blind with 4 Hands, 3 Discards, and 300 required score.

zh.headline: 选择 Small Blind。
zh.reason: Small Blind 是当前线性 blind 路径里唯一可进入的目标，因此直接进入它最能保留本回合 tempo。
zh.outcome: 已进入 Small Blind，当前有 4 次 Hands、3 次 Discards，过关需要 300 分。

en.headline: Cash Out.
en.reason: Cash Out is the only tempo-positive action after clearing the blind.
en.outcome: Collected $3 and entered Shop.

zh.outcome: 本次 Cash Out 获得 $3，并进入 Shop。

en.headline: Buy Mime.
en.reason: Mime clears the shop threshold at rarity 2 for $5.
en.outcome: Bought Mime; bankroll is now $2.

zh.reason: Mime 以 $5 满足本轮的 shop threshold，rarity 为 2。
zh.outcome: 已购买 Mime；当前 bankroll 为 $2。

en.headline: Advance to next round.
en.reason: No remaining shop action beats the tempo value of advancing the run.
en.outcome: Advanced to Ante 1.

zh.headline: 进入下一回合。
zh.reason: 当前没有任何剩余 shop 动作能超过直接推进回合的 tempo 价值。
zh.outcome: 已推进到 Ante 1。

en.headline: Mark discard package.
en.reason: This card is outside the strongest keep shell. Marking it for discard improves redraw quality around the current made rank group.
en.outcome: Marked 1/6 discard candidates; discard will resolve once the package is complete.

zh.headline: 标记 discard 组合。
zh.reason: 这张牌不属于最强的 keep shell。先把它标记进 discard，可以围绕当前 made rank group 提升 redraw 质量。
zh.outcome: 当前已标记 1/6 张 discard 目标；完成整包后就会执行 discard。

en.headline: Reroll shop.
en.reason: No current shop offer clears the buy threshold. Spending $1 on a reroll is acceptable at this bankroll level.
en.outcome: Shop rerolled; bankroll is now $9.

zh.headline: 执行 reroll_shop。
zh.reason: 当前 shop 没有任何商品达到买入阈值，所以在当前 bankroll 下花 $1 reroll 是合理的。

en.headline: Mark discard package.
en.reason: This card is outside the strongest keep shell. Marking it for discard improves redraw quality around the current made rank group.
en.outcome: Marked 1/6 discard candidates; discard will resolve once the package is complete.

zh.headline: 标记 discard 组合。
zh.reason: 这张牌不属于最强的 keep shell。先把它标记进 discard，可以围绕当前 made rank group 提升 redraw 质量。
zh.outcome: 当前已标记 1/6 张 discard 目标；完成整包后就会执行 discard。

en.headline: Discard for redraw.
en.reason: The current best line is only Pair. With discards still available, redraw equity is worth more than forcing a low-value play.
en.outcome: Discard resolved; 1 Discards remain and the hand refilled to 8 cards.

zh.headline: 执行 discard 换牌。
zh.reason: 当前最好的出牌也只有 Pair。在还有 discards 的情况下，redraw equity 高于强行打出低价值手牌。
zh.outcome: discard 已结算；剩余 1 次 Discards，手牌已补回到 8 张。
